text:
Just a reminder that our Philly Shih Tzus x @getpawchart  official launch event is TODAY at @fetchparkmanayunk 5-7pm! 

Please remember to bring copies of your dog's vaccination records so you can enjoy the park without any issues.

Courtesy of @getpawchart - everyone's first drink is on them! 

We will also have an artist creating free mini doodles of your dog. To receive a doodle, you must have your free @getpawchart account set up.

It only takes a few simple steps:

Download the @getpawchart app (link was shared via email) 
Create your account
You're all set!

See you tonight! 🐾🖤
